basic_details.job_title: Puri Wildlife Division Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Subject Matter Specialist Posts
basic_details.short_information: he Puri Wildlife Division has published the Subject Matter Specialist – Seagrass Notification 2026 on 02 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 Subject Matter Specialist positions. Candidates within the 23 to 45 years age range and holding qualifications such as M.Sc. / M.Tech in Oceanography / Marine Science or M.Sc. in Botany / Life Science / Environmental Science / Coastal Ecology are eligible to apply offline at https://www.puri.odisha.gov.in. The application process will be active until 22 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 23 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. / M.Tech in Oceanography / Marine Science, M.Sc. in Botany / Life Science / Environmental Science / Coastal Ecology
qualification.details: SMS – Seagrass (Plant Specialist): M.Sc. in Botany / Life Science / Environmental Science / Coastal Ecology. Minimum 1 year post-qualification experience in marine ecology, seagrass ecology, wetland ecosystems, coastal habitat restoration or related field. Desirable: Knowledge of GIS / Remote Sensing. SMS – Seagrass (Marine Biologist): M.Sc. / M.Tech in Oceanography / Marine Science from a recognized University. Minimum 1 year post-qualification experience in life science / marine science field. Preference: experience in marine ecology, seagrass ecosystem studies / implementation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Puri Wildlife Division Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.puri.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Puri Wildlife Division Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Subject Matter Specialist - Seagrass posts is 22nd May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Subject Matter Specialist - Seagrass posts?
faq.answer: For the Plant Specialist role, an M.Sc. in Botany, Life Science, Environmental Science, or Coastal Ecology is required. For the Marine Biologist role, an M.Sc. or M.Tech in Oceanography or Marine Science is necessary. Specific experience is also detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Puri Wildlife Division recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between a minimum of 23 years and a maximum of 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the government's guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Subject Matter Specialist - Seagrass positions?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 50,000/-. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in the Puri Wildlife Division Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Subject Matter Specialist - Seagrass posts. These are divided equally between the Plant Specialist and Marine Biologist specializations.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Puri Wildlife Division recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Subject Matter Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve two main stages: initial shortlisting of applications based on eligibility criteria and qualifications, followed by a personal interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application format are available on the official website of the Puri Wildlife Division, which is www.puri.odisha.gov.in. Candidates should download these documents from the website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the experience required for the Subject Matter Specialist - Seagrass posts?
faq.answer: For the Plant Specialist role, a minimum of 1 year of post-qualification experience in marine ecology or related fields is required. For the Marine Biologist role, a minimum of 1 year of post-qualification experience in life science or marine science is needed, with a preference for marine ecology experience.
